name: Medical Ikkou Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Medical Ikkou Group Co.,Ltd. operates dispensing pharmacies in Japan. The company is also involved in the operation of nursing homes, outpatient nursing care facilities, and home-visit nursing care facilities; wholesale of generic drugs; and rental of real estate properties, as well as invests in listed and unlisted stocks, M&A, etc. It operates 93 dispensing pharmacy stores. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Tsu, Japan.
